description: In Romania after capturing Radcliffe, Hive and his followers (including Daisy, James, and Alisha) force the scientist to cooperate. Hive reveals his plan to Radcliffe: use him to replicate the Kree's original experiment and permanently change humanity. The scale and threat of Hive’s plan become fully clear as the episode ends on his ominous declaration.

transcript.line: All right, then what about “Hellfire?” It's better than “Scorch,” but I'm worried it's too much.
You're a difficult man to find, doctor.

Well, technically, I'm one of the first genetically altered human beings on the planet. Scientifically, humans have advanced almost to the level the Kree reached when they made me. You, doctor, seem to be the closest.
Very flattering, and I agree. But genome editing, we've only just begun that kind of DNA modification. To... To make something of your kind, that's... We can only dream.
You don't need to dream anymore. We are one organism, seeking change. And with your help, we're going to redefine humanity. Permanently.
Is that even possible? H-How could you...
By re-creating the same Kree experiment that was done to me. And this is where it all begins.
No. I bought us a whole town.
